source_checks: Run ft status and record cache freshness.
Run ft show or ft search for the exact status id before extracting claims.
Separate primary author posts, secondary summaries, quoted posts, and inferred commentary.
workflows.status_gate: cached or referenced-not-cached sources can become structured case cards; to-collect sources stay in the roadmap.
forbidden_claims: Do not quote a referenced-not-cached primary post as if it was directly read.
Do not treat secondary numeric scores as reproduced benchmark results.
Do not store X cookies, API tokens, or private browser state in the repository.

source_checks: Identify the exact artifact file or public repository path.
Extract the failure mode, observable state, action surface, and policy update target.
State what the lightweight replay removes from the original runtime.
workflows.status_gate: A public artifact becomes reproduced only after a runnable example, feedback report, and regression test exist.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim full Atari, VizDoom, or MuJoCo reproduction from a lightweight replay.
Do not remove source attribution when simplifying dependencies.
Do not skip the report and test paths when adding a replay.

workflows.signal_type: Internal Feishu or private operational signal
source_checks: Record only a sanitized source label, date, and problem shape.
Translate the private task into an abstract environment and failure mode.
Confirm that no raw message, meeting note, private link, or personal data enters the repository.
workflows.status_gate: Internal signals can become minimal environments after sanitization; they cannot publish raw source text.
forbidden_claims: Do not publish Feishu raw content, meeting transcripts, or private links.
Do not imply a sanitized toy environment is a production deployment.
Do not include private logs or screenshots.

source_checks: Mark the source as to-collect, located, or working hypothesis.
Write the falsification path before writing the conclusion.
Bind the hypothesis to a future example, metric, or artifact gap.
workflows.status_gate: A hypothesis stays out of reproduced claims until it has an example, metric, and verification command.
forbidden_claims: Do not turn a hypothesis into a mainline claim without evidence.
Do not hide missing X/API retrieval behind vague community wording.
Do not treat a project proposal as an experiment result.
